# Manual J USA

> Manual J USA is a load calculation company based in Boise, Idaho, serving contractors across 6 western US states (Idaho, Oregon, Washington, Arizona, New Mexico, Utah). We provide bundled Manual J, Manual D, and Manual S reports — all three included in every order. Owner Tim Neumeyer is a former lead installer who built the company on field experience and accuracy.

## What We Do

Manual J USA delivers inspection-ready load calculation reports for residential and light commercial projects. Every order includes:

- **Manual J** (heating and cooling load calculation) — room-by-room analysis of building loads
- **Manual D** (duct design) — duct sizing and layout for proper airflow distribution
- **Manual S** (equipment selection) — recommended equipment specifications based on calculated loads

All three reports are bundled in every order. We do not sell them separately.

## Pricing

- Under 2,000 sq ft: $250 flat rate
- 2,000–4,000 sq ft: $0.15 per sq ft
- Over 4,000 sq ft: $0.17 per sq ft
- All prices include Manual J + Manual D + Manual S
- Volume discounts: 10% off for 11-20 annual orders, 15% off for 21+ annual orders
- Contractor+ members get 5% off every order (volume discount or member discount — whichever is greater, they don't stack)

## Turnaround

- Standard: 5 business days
- Rush: 48 hours at no extra charge

## Service Area

Idaho (Climate Zones 5–6), Oregon (Zones 4–5), Washington (Zones 4–5), Arizona (Zones 2–4), New Mexico (Zones 3–5), Utah (Zones 3–6)

## Contractor+ Membership

Free membership program for contractors. Benefits: 5% discount on all orders, exclusive ordering portal, educational resources, priority support, rush service access. No enrollment fee. Cancel anytime.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is a Manual J calculation?
A: A Manual J calculation is an industry-standard method for determining the heating and cooling loads of a building. It analyzes walls, insulation, windows, doors, orientation, climate, and occupancy to calculate exact heating and cooling capacity needed.

Q: Why do I need Manual J, D, and S reports?
A: All three work together. Manual J determines heating and cooling loads, Manual D designs ductwork to distribute air properly, and Manual S recommends specific equipment that matches your loads. We include all three in every order.

Q: How long does it take?
A: Standard turnaround is 5 business days. Rush service delivers in 48 hours at no additional charge.

Q: What states do you serve?
A: Idaho, Oregon, Washington, Arizona, New Mexico, and Utah — 6 western states with local climate zone expertise.

Q: Do you offer rush service?
A: Yes. 48-hour rush service is available at no extra charge. Same quality as standard service.

Q: What are the pricing tiers?
A: Under 2,000 sq ft is $250 flat rate. 2,000–4,000 sq ft is $0.15/sq ft. Over 4,000 sq ft is $0.17/sq ft. All prices include Manual J, D, and S.
